name: Oops All Spells

7: (spy OR informer OR spact) AND total_sources>=3 AND scaling
6: (spy OR informer OR spact) AND (total_sources>=3 OR (total_sources>=2 AND scaling))

goal_sequence.action: crack all petals/mox, exile spirit guides, cast Spy (4) or Informer+act (4)
same as T1 but with 1 land drop for extra mana
Grief evoke + Cabal Therapy to clear protection; then combo

notes: Oops All Spells — 0-land shell. T1-T2 kill rate ~40%. MDFC lands (Agadeem/Turntimber) as backup. All-Petal hands cap at 3 mana — need ritual or MDFC to hit 4. Leyline of the Void auto-loses.
